name: com.confluent/managed-mcp
description: Confluent Cloud managed MCP endpoints for read-only organization, connector, metrics, topic, and schema inspection.

region.description: Confluent Cloud region, for example us-west-2.

cloud.description: Confluent Cloud provider: aws, gcp, or azure.

ai.quickdeploy.registry/auth.notes: Confluent managed MCP uses Base64-encoded API key and secret credentials in the Authorization header.
